title: force/force_initial: verify rwprobe target's color
body:
Don't allow forcing into a layer, but do allow forcing out.

Example of the former that we presently incorrectly allow:

```
FIRRTL version 5.0.0

circuit Foo:
  layer L, bind:
  public module Foo:
    input y : UInt<5>

    wire p : RWProbe<UInt<5>, L>
    force_initial(p, UInt<5>(3))

    layerblock L:
      wire x : UInt<5>
      connect x, y
      define p = rwprobe(x)
```
code_blocks:
FIRRTL version 5.0.0

circuit Foo:
  layer L, bind:
  public module Foo:
    input y : UInt<5>

    wire p : RWProbe<UInt<5>, L>
    force_initial(p, UInt<5>(3))

    layerblock L:
      wire x : UInt<5>
      connect x, y
      define p = rwprobe(x)
